label: Metabolism
description: Energy conversion, biosynthesis, carbon flow, and nutrient cycling.

label: Signaling and Cell Fate
description: Signal cascades, decision points, cell cycle control, and apoptosis.

label: Gene Expression
description: Replication, transcription, translation, regulatory switches, and genome editing.

label: Lab Protocols
description: Assays and experimental procedures used in molecular biology labs.

label: Organismal Biology
description: Development, physiology, ecology, behavior, and organism-level processes.

label: Immunology and Host Defense
description: Immune recognition, antigen presentation, lymphocyte activation, complement, and inflammatory responses.

label: Cell Biology and Proteostasis
description: Protein folding, degradation, autophagy, trafficking, and cell-state maintenance.
